name: booth-mcp
description: Read-only tools for safely querying BOOTH seller products, orders, sales, and customer conversations

interface.shortDescription: Read BOOTH seller products, orders, sales, and messages
interface.longDescription: Safely query and analyze products, orders, sales, customer conversations, and public shop settings from a BOOTH seller account.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my BOOTH shop and recent sales.
Show the BOOTH orders that need attention.
Show my recent BOOTH customer conversations.
